prerequisites: An active Wasabi Hot Cloud Storage account with access to the Wasabi Console at https://console.wasabisys.com.

A Wasabi access key and secret key pair created from the console (Root account user, or a Sub-User granted the WasabiAccountStatsAccess and/or WasabiBucketStatsAccess policies). The keys must be Root keys or have associated billing/stats permissions to reach the Stats API endpoints.
A start_date value marking the earliest day from which to begin retrieving utilization stats.

authMethods.name: API key (access key and secret key)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single secret field api_key. The Wasabi Stats API authenticates via the Authorization HTTP header, whose value is the access key and secret key joined as <ACCESS_KEY>:<SECRET_KEY>. Provide that access-key:secret-key pair as the api_key. Requests are sent to the Stats API base URL https://stats.wasabisys.com/.

setupSteps.title: Create an access key in the Wasabi Console
setupSteps.body: Log in to the Wasabi Console at https://console.wasabisys.com and click Access Keys in the left menu. Click Create Access Key, choose a Root account user or a Sub-User, then click Create. The access key and secret key are displayed once; download or copy them immediately, since the secret key cannot be retrieved again. Never share the secret key.

setupSteps.title: Grant stats policies for sub-users (if applicable)
setupSteps.body: If you created the access key for a Sub-User rather than the Root account, assign the policies that allow access to the Stats API endpoints: WasabiAccountStatsAccess for account-level stats and WasabiBucketStatsAccess for bucket-level stats. Policies can be assigned during user creation or later through the Users link in the Wasabi menu. Root account keys already have the required permissions.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key credential
setupSteps.body: Set the connector's api_key field to your Wasabi credential in the form <ACCESS_KEY>:<SECRET_KEY>, matching the value Wasabi expects in the Authorization header for Stats API calls.

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should begin retrieving utilization data.

sources.title: Generating a Wasabi Stats API Key
